heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 15205 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Attorney General such sums as may be necessary to carry out this chapter.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , May. 30, 2001, , known as the Public Safety Officer Medal of Valor Act of 2001, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 107–12115 Stat. 20section 15201 of this title
